identity.fantasy: Reach into a dreamy night sky, catch three drifting morning stars, and assemble them into a glowing constellation before dawn.
identity.playerVerb: Reach and hold a hand or pointer over each moving starlight target.
identity.targetMetaphor: Warm five-point stars that trail light, fill a capture ring, burst into sparkles, and fly into the constellation shelf.

beats.purpose: Catch a large forgiving first light and learn the visible hold ring.
Follow a smaller drifting star with a longer, calmer capture hold.
Reach the smallest final morning star and complete the dawn constellation.

reactiveStates: capture ring filling with a luminous trail
caught star bursting and flying into the constellation
presenter.continuousFeedback: The target glow, light trail, capture ring, localized mission tally, reaction callout, and constellation shelf update continuously with every reach.
presenter.scoreAndResolution: A persistent three-star tally spans three distinct rounds and resolves in a localized constellation-complete panel with an orbital dawn celebration.
